title: Skiing 滑雪
scene: Oliver和爸爸去滑雪场，学习基本滑雪技巧。

lines.en: Dad, look at all the snow! I can not wait to ski!
lines.zh: 爸爸，看这雪！我等不及要滑雪了！

lines.en: Me too! But first, put on your goggles and gloves.
lines.zh: 我也是！但首先，戴上护目镜和手套。

lines.en: OK. These skis are really long.
lines.zh: 好的。这些滑雪板好长啊。

lines.en: Keep your knees bent and lean forward a little.
lines.zh: 膝盖弯曲，身体微微前倾。

lines.en: Ha ha, yes! Now try to slide slowly.
lines.zh: 哈哈，对！现在试着慢慢滑。

lines.en: I am sliding! This is so fun!
Do not go too fast. Make a pizza shape with your skis.
lines.zh: 不要太快。把滑雪板摆成披萨形状。

lines.en: Pizza shape? Oh, it slows me down!
lines.zh: 披萨形状？噢，我慢下来了！

lines.en: That is right! It is called the snowplow.
I love skiing! Can we come again tomorrow?
lines.zh: 我喜欢滑雪！明天还能来吗？
